user.title: Eaton xComfort Bridge
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with the bridge. 'Device auth code' uses the single code shown in the xComfort Bridge app. 'Named user account' uses a username and password configured in the app.

auth.title: Eaton xComfort Bridge
auth.description: Choose how to authenticate with the discovered bridge.

abort.no_devices_found: No Eaton xComfort Bridge devices found on the network.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check the values shown in the xComfort Bridge app and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the xComfort Bridge at the given IP address.
error.username_required: Username is required when using a named user account.
error.secret_required: The secret / auth key is required.

power_energy_sensors.name: Power/Energy Sensors
power_energy_sensors.description: Configure power and energy sensor creation.
